title: [release-1.41] Restore the default meaning of `--pull` (should be `always`).
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #6300

/assign nalind

```release-note
Restore the meaning of `--pull` (without argument), similar to the docker behavior: now defaults to `--pull=always`
```
